calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:45am
Judge Pro Tem Steve Weber, clerk J. Kong, not reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claism Appeal. Appellant, Liberty park Management, Inc, not present; respondent, Luis Miguel Arroya Hernandez appears as pro per with witness Fernando Amaya. Parties previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Steve Weber.

10:47am
Matter is submitted. No newly evidence presented in the court.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-27-2013 Judgment Entered
